text:
Created attachment 153292
dmesg ifconfig pciconf vmstat

Environment:
FreeBSD Current 11 amd64

Description:
msk0 watchdog timeout display on tty. ping -c 3 google.com brings back packets. But after a pkg updater/make install any subsequent commands cause the connection to become unresponsive. I have other recommended switches in my rc.conf(hw.msk.msi_disable=1 hw.pci.enable_msix=0) sysctl.conf(net.inet.tcp.tso=0)


How to repeat:
Use any Marvel Sky2 driver

Fix:
None at this time.
